reviews.review_description:
Very nice app.
Please Quest support.please....
This is a mindblowing experience.  I gave it 4stars because in the second part you couldn't look up while the cosmonauts were talking without missing the translation pop up
very good videoquality. but my s7 overheated.
Great documentary, very beautiful in the Oculus Go. I hope there is more of this to come

reviews.review_title: I wish it had more cool visuals
reviews.review_description: It would had been better if there were more outer space 360 3D shots. I understand it needed interviews but having someone speak directly to the camera wasn't the greatest use of 360 3D imagery in my opinion for vr. There were a couple of amazing shots but for such a short video I just wish there were more, etc. If that was the case I would probably rewatch the video numerous times to relive the experience.

I originally streamed Chapter One. It blew me away. The subject matter, the presentation and the overall experience are just amazing. There was a lot of stuttering audio while streaming so I downloaded the video and watched it again. Problem solved...sounds great. I am keeping this on my device to show others how far the VR tech has come and give them a taste of that VR "wow factor". Well done...I highly recommend!
This is how the VR meant ro be! You will not regret even with full price. This documentary is nothing you've ever seen and it worth morenthan it's price. Recommended.
App keeps crashing before it opens. I have theGo so can’t find purchase history to request refund

developer_response.body: Thank you for reporting this! We would greatly appreciate a bit more information, in order to resolve this. Please private message to qa@felixandpaul.com with a bit more information on your issue, and our quality assurance team will get back to you as soon as possible. Thank you, and we look forward to helping you soon!

reviews.review_description:
I purchased this yesterday on Oculus Go and also could find no way to play the video..

Updated Review:
The option to stream or download is there now and works well.
I enjoyed the videos and am looking forward to further chapters.
Great demonstration of how far VR got. I’m looking forward to episode 2.

Love the story and the visuals are so real. Really gives a quick science lesson on our history of space exploration. Only bad thing is my phone { galaxy s7 edge } over heard within 10 min into the video. Overall good video.
Beautiful and informative. I had problems with Episode 2 playing but after a restart I got it working.

As I’ve said before in other reviews, space is a natural subject for VR storytelling. It may not signify an automatic success, but there is a lot for developers to work with when undertaking this subject matter. Instead of coming up with something cheap and gimmicky just to capitalize on the medium, Felix & Paul Studios has produced an app of such quality that it stakes its claim as essential to the platform. This comes highly recommended, especially if you have a passion for space. Even if you have just a casual interest, Space Explorers is likely to inform and entertain you. The app is divided into 2 episodes, each 20-25 minutes long, and both focus on the development and training of NASA’s space expeditions and the stories of a few selected astronauts. You are given the option to either stream or download the episodes, but for me streaming was not an option. The episodes were unplayable. Instead, I downloaded them and while they still exhibited some choppiness in the video and audio, they mostly played fine. Bear in mind that these videos take up roughly about 3 GB of space each, so make sure to have enough room to not compromise quality. This will be worth it. Between loads of information, stunning visuals, and pleasant narration by Captain Marvel herself, I was highly engaged. I’m thinking you will be too.
I love what the Felix and Paul studio created. So inspiring. The quality of image and camera placement is superb. This is some of the best quality content available.
Just exceptional! Thank you for making this documentary

I find myself starting to look for "Felix & Paul"-apps now, as they have not let me down yet. This app is another confirmation. If you're a space lover: this app is a must-see...or rather: a "must-experience". Not too short, good quality and totally worth the buy. Loved it!
The audio is terrible on the 2nd episode. A lot of static and cracking and the video is sometimes jumpy. Could you pls fix it otherwise it’s fantastic!
I cannot even download on oculus go. Waste of 2 💵.

developer_response.body: Hi m456an, thanks for letting us know about this. Can you please send an email to QA@felixandpaul.com detailing the problem? Our team will follow up to help from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Took far too long to stream and download the experience. I want a refund.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for letting us know about this issue. We'd like to make it right. Can you please send an email to QA@felixandpaul.com detailing the problem, including what device you are using? Our team will follow up to help from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: This remarkable film puts you alongside astronauts as they train for future missions. It is completely immersive and will leave you humbled.
